summary: Iteration 91: Complete testing of 'Audit & Non Conformità' module at /audit. Backend: 51/51 pytest tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 20 UI features verified successfully including KPI cards, tabs, audit/NC CRUD dialogs, search filtering, close/reopen NC flow, delete confirmations, and sidebar link.
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing (audit-page, btn-add-audit, btn-add-nc, search-audit, audit-tabs, tab-audits, tab-ncs, audit-row-{id}, nc-row-{id}, audit-form-dialog, nc-form-dialog, nc-detail-dialog, delete-audit-dialog, delete-nc-dialog)
NC auto-numbering (NC-YYYY-NNN format) working correctly with year-based counter
days_open calculation correct for both open NCs (days since creation) and closed NCs (days between creation and closure)
Audit deletion correctly unlinks associated NCs (sets audit_id to null) without deleting them
KPI cards (NC Aperte, Audit Anno, Prossimo Audit, NC Chiuse) showing correct stats values
Status badges correctly implemented: Aperta (red), In Lavorazione (amber), Chiusa (green)
Priority badges correctly implemented: Alta (red), Media (amber), Bassa (gray)
Audit type badges working: Interno (blue), Ente Certificatore (purple), Cliente (teal)
Audit outcome badges working: Positivo (green), Negativo (red), Con Osservazioni (amber)
Close NC sets closure_date and closed_by from current user; Reopen NC clears these fields
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during testing. Original seed data preserved: 2 audits (aud_test000001, aud_test000002) and 4 NCs (NC-2025-001, NC-2025-002, NC-2026-001, NC-2026-002).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Audit & NC module is fully functional. Key data-testids: audit-page, audit-stats-bar, audit-tabs, tab-audits, tab-ncs, search-audit, btn-add-audit, btn-add-nc, audit-row-{audit_id}, nc-row-{nc_id}, btn-edit-audit-{id}, btn-del-audit-{id}, btn-add-nc-audit-{id}, btn-close-nc-{id}, btn-reopen-nc-{id}, btn-view-nc-{id}, btn-del-nc-{id}, audit-form-dialog, nc-form-dialog, nc-detail-dialog, delete-audit-dialog, delete-nc-dialog. Seed data: 2 audits (1 interno con_osservazioni + 1 esterno_ente positivo), 4 NCs (2 aperte, 1 in_lavorazione, 1 chiusa). Stats: nc_open=2, audits_this_year=1, next_audit_date=2026-06-15, nc_closed=1.

features_verified.backend_list_audits: PASS - GET /api/audits returns list with stats (audits_this_year, nc_open, nc_closed, next_audit_date)
features_verified.backend_audit_stats_values: PASS - Stats match seeded data: 2 audits, 1 this year, next_audit=2026-06-15
features_verified.backend_create_audit: PASS - POST /api/audits (multipart form with optional file upload)
features_verified.backend_delete_audit: PASS - DELETE /api/audits/{id} unlinks NCs without deleting them
features_verified.backend_list_ncs: PASS - GET /api/ncs returns list with stats (aperte, in_lavorazione, chiuse, by priority)
features_verified.backend_nc_stats_values: PASS - Stats match seeded data: 4 total, 2 aperte, 1 in_lavorazione, 1 chiusa
features_verified.backend_create_standalone_nc: PASS - POST /api/ncs creates NC not linked to audit
features_verified.backend_create_nc_linked_to_audit: PASS - POST /api/audits/{id}/ncs creates NC linked to audit
features_verified.backend_nc_auto_numbering: PASS - NC numbers follow NC-YYYY-NNN format
features_verified.backend_days_open_calculation: PASS - Correct calculation for open and closed NCs
features_verified.backend_update_nc: PASS - PUT /api/ncs/{id} updates cause, corrective_action, preventive_action, priority, status, notes
features_verified.backend_close_nc: PASS - PUT /api/ncs/{id}/close sets closure_date and closed_by
features_verified.backend_reopen_nc: PASS - PUT /api/ncs/{id}/reopen clears closure_date and closed_by, sets status=aperta
features_verified.backend_error_handling: PASS - 404 for nonexistent resources, 400 for invalid operations, 422 for validation errors
features_verified.frontend_page_load: PASS - /audit loads with DashboardLayout, title 'Audit & Miglioramento'
features_verified.frontend_kpi_cards: PASS - 4 cards (NC Aperte, Audit Anno, Prossimo Audit, NC Chiuse) with correct icons and values
features_verified.frontend_tabs: PASS - 'Registro Audit' and 'Non Conformità' tabs switch content correctly
features_verified.frontend_audit_table: PASS - Shows audits with type/outcome badges, NC count, action buttons
features_verified.frontend_nc_table: PASS - Shows NCs with priority/status badges, days_open, action buttons
features_verified.frontend_search_filter: PASS - Single search input filters both audit and NC tabs
features_verified.frontend_nuovo_audit_dialog: PASS - Form with date, type, auditor, scope, outcome, next_audit_date, notes, file upload
features_verified.frontend_modifica_audit_dialog: PASS - Opens with pre-filled data, title 'Modifica Audit'
features_verified.frontend_nuova_nc_dialog: PASS - Form with date, description, source, priority
features_verified.frontend_add_nc_from_audit_row: PASS - Click triangle icon on audit row opens NC dialog linked to that audit
features_verified.frontend_nc_detail_dialog: PASS - Shows cause, corrective_action, preventive_action fields + Close/Reopen buttons
features_verified.frontend_close_nc_button: PASS - Close NC button visible for open NCs, triggers /close endpoint
features_verified.frontend_reopen_nc_button: PASS - Reopen NC button visible for closed NCs, triggers /reopen endpoint
features_verified.frontend_delete_audit_dialog: PASS - Confirmation dialog with warning about NC unlinking
features_verified.frontend_sidebar_link: PASS - 'Audit & NC' link under Certificazioni group in sidebar

test_classes: TestAuditList (8 tests) - list, structure, stats, item structure, enum validation, search
TestAuditCRUD (7 tests) - create, read, update, verify persistence, delete
TestNCList (12 tests) - list, structure, stats, NC number format, enum validation, days_open, search, filters
TestNCCRUD (12 tests) - create standalone, auto-numbering, read, update details, close, close-already-closed, reopen, reopen-non-closed, delete
TestNCLinkedToAudit (5 tests) - create audit, create linked NC, audit shows nc_count, delete audit unlinks NCs
TestErrorHandling (8 tests) - 404 for nonexistent, 400 for invalid ops, 422 for validation

tests: KPI cards (NC Aperte, Audit Anno, Prossimo Audit, NC Chiuse)
NC table with priority/status badges and days_open
Nuovo Audit dialog with all form fields
Modifica Audit dialog opens with pre-filled data
Nuova NC dialog with all form fields
Add NC from audit row (linked to audit)
NC detail dialog with cause/corrective/preventive fields
